summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Smart Import feature for Garment ERP v8.0. All backend APIs are fully functional (100% pass rate) and frontend UI is working correctly with proper navigation, data type selection, file upload interface, preset functionality, and step indicators.
passed_tests: Admin login with credentials admin@garment.com / Admin@123
Smart Import module accessible via TOOLS section in sidebar
Step indicator shows all 5 steps: Upload, Mapping, Preview, Konfirmasi, Selesai
All 5 data type options visible and selectable (Production PO, Products, Accessories, Vendors, Buyers)
File drop zone visible with proper file type indicators (Excel/CSV, Foto/Scan, PDF)
Preset panel opens and closes correctly with 'Preset' button
Tips section visible at bottom with comprehensive usage guidance
Upload button properly disabled when no file selected
Data type selection works for all 5 types with proper visual feedback
UI styling is clean and professional with proper color schemes
Header and description properly displayed
File type indicators properly styled and visible
Backend: Admin login API works correctly
Backend: GET /api/smart-import/fields/{data_type} returns correct field definitions for all 5 data types
Backend: GET /api/smart-import/presets returns empty array initially
Backend: POST /api/smart-import/upload successfully handles CSV file upload
Backend: POST /api/smart-import/analyze correctly analyzes file structure and generates mapping suggestions
Backend: POST /api/smart-import/preview generates preview data with row status and validation
Backend: POST /api/smart-import/enhance-mapping LLM enhancement works correctly
Backend: Preset CRUD operations (create, read, delete) work correctly
Backend: Error handling for invalid file types and missing sessions
Backend: All API responses have correct structure and required fields
Backend: File upload detection correctly identifies CSV file type
Backend: Column mapping suggestions generated with confidence scores
Backend: Preview rows include status badges and validation errors
Backend: LLM integration functional for mapping enhancement

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI elements and interactions working correctly)
